mutation: Added Step 1.3 Pre-Generation Density Check to Phase 1: count elements, flag overflows, plan splits before generating. Applies to all modes.
Dark theme token rule: rgba() overlays are the only permitted bare color values outside :root in dark theme output. All other bare hex is a violation.
Animation application note in Phase 3: .reveal class from pf-motion.md applied to slide content elements only when user explicitly requests animation. revealSlide() triggered on .active.
Phase 4 PPTX step 4: density limit check reminder added for PPTX-sourced content — PPTX slides frequently overflow limits.
